steps.title: Read confirmed in context
steps.content: The land is only "with some exaggeration" called a garden, so the blooming flower beds make that illusion feel more believable. In context, "confirmed" means gave evidence for or supported the impression.

steps.title: Match the evidence meaning
steps.content: A means made necessary, C means formally named, and D points to a future expectation. The word that means supported with evidence or gave substance to is "substantiated." The answer is B.
